name: 10 — Monthly Reporting

nodes.name: Schedule 1st of Month 9AM AEST
nodes.notes: Runs at 23:00 UTC (09:00 AEST) on days 28-31. The Code node below checks if today is actually the 1st, filtering out the 28-30th. Alternatively configure pg_cron in Supabase for precision.

parameters.url: ={{ $vars.SUPABASE_URL }}/rest/v1/events?lead_id=eq.{{ $('Split Per Subscription').first().json.lead_id }}&event_type=eq.call.received&created_at=gte.{{ new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth() - 1, 1).toISOString() }}&created_at=lt.{{ new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth(), 1).toISOString() }}&select=event_id

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id, subscription_id: $json.subscription_id, period_year: $json.report_year, period_month: $json.report_month, call_count: $json.call_count, search_impressions: 0, search_clicks: 0, report_html: $json.report_html }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ From: 'reports@mysitehq.com.au', To: $('Build Report HTML').first().json.email, Subject: $('Build Report HTML').first().json.business_name + ' — ' + ['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December'][$('Build Report HTML').first().json.report_month - 1] + ' performance report', HtmlBody: $('Build Report HTML').first().json.report_html, TextBody: 'Your monthly report for ' + $('Build Report HTML').first().json.business_name + ' is ready. ' + $('Build Report HTML').first().json.call_count + ' calls tracked.', MessageStream: 'outbound' }) }}

parameters.url: ={{ $vars.SUPABASE_URL }}/rest/v1/monthly_reports?lead_id=eq.{{ $('Build Report HTML').first().json.lead_id }}&period_year=eq.{{ $('Build Report HTML').first().json.report_year }}&period_month=eq.{{ $('Build Report HTML').first().json.report_month }}
parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), postmark_message_id: $('Send Monthly Report Email').first().json.MessageID || null }) }}

data.jsonData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Build Report HTML').first().json.lead_id, trigger_type: $('Build Report HTML').first().json.trigger_upsell ? 'milestone' : 'plateau', call_count: $('Build Report HTML').first().json.call_count }) }}

notes: Runs monthly. Call count comes from the events table (event_type = 'call.received'). To integrate CallRail or Google Search Console, add HTTP Request nodes after 'Fetch Call Count from Events' and merge the data in 'Build Report HTML'. GSC requires OAuth2 — configure the Google credential in n8n Settings → Credentials before activating. WORKFLOW_ID_11_UPSELL must be set after importing workflow 11.
